text.title: funnel-tactics-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for funnel-tactics-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Optimizing small funnel leaks before fixing the largest drop-off stage.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fixing a 5% checkout drop-off while a 50% bounce rate on the landing page exists wastes all effort — the checkout improvement cannot compound when most users never reach checkout.

failure-mode.description: Recommending "remove all form fields" without a recovery plan for the trimmed fields.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Progressive profiling — gathering removed fields after signup via in-app prompts — must be specified alongside any field-reduction recommendation or the data is permanently lost.

failure-mode.description: Auto-publishing landing page variants without experiment flag and human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Direct production changes bypass the A/B test framework, contaminate existing tests, and prevent clean rollback if the change causes a regression.
